rationale: Clear, plain-English opening with a useful formula and concrete mill-rate example. The sectioning is logical and homeowner-friendly. But the piece is cut off mid-explanation, so it never fully explains how tax rates are set or why bills change year to year, which limits flow and overall effectiveness.
